mapper.select: SELECT U.user_id , CASE U.user_type WHEN 'PM' THEN PM.platform_manager_name WHEN 'HM' THEN HM.center_manager_name WHEN 'US' THEN E.employee_name END AS cancel_name FROM user U LEFT JOIN employee E ON U.user_id = E.user_id LEFT JOIN platform_manager PM ON U.user_id = PM.user_id LEFT JOIN center_manager HM ON U.user_id = HM.user_id WHERE U.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT R.reservation_id , R.reservation_state , R.registered_at , R.employee_notes , R.hospital_notes , R.platform_notes , R.support_pay , CCST.upgrade_pay , R.copay , R.sum_item_copay , R.sum_item_discount_bill , R.hospital_pay , R.platform_pay , R.desired_at , R.checkuped_at , DATE_FORMAT(R.checkuped_at, '%p') AS checkuped_ampm , R.confirmed_at , DATE_FORMAT(R.confirmed_at, '%p') AS confirmed_ampm , H.hospital_id , H.hospital_name , HC.center_id , HC.center_name , E.user_id , E.employee_name , E.birth , E.sex , CASE WHEN E.myself IS NULL THEN (SELECT employee_name FROM employee WHERE employee_code = E.employee_code AND employee.company_id = E.company_id AND myself = 1) END AS family_name , CHT.type_self , CHT.type_copay , CHT.type_family , E.mobile , E.zipcode , E.address1 , E.address2 , E.email , C.company_id , C.company_name , CC.checkup_date_begin , CC.checkup_date_end , CC.reserve_date_begin , CC.reserve_date_end , E.myself , IFNULL(E.depart, '') AS depart , IFNULL(E.title, '') AS title , EC.support_type , EC.notes , E.employee_no , CHT.company_checkup_type_id , CHT.company_checkup_type_code , CHT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.checkup_contract_type_id , CCST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , CCST.sub_type_name , EC.special_checkup , IFNULL(EC.special_checkup_memo, '') AS special_checkup_memo , R.state_notes , HCV.hospital_center_name -- , RI.register FROM reservation R -- LEFT JOIN reservation_item RI ON R.reservation_id = RI.reservation_id LEFT JOIN employee_checkup EC ON R.employee_checkup_id = EC.employee_checkup_id LEFT JOIN employee E ON EC.user_id = E.user_id LEFT JOIN company C ON E.company_id = C.company_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type CCST ON R.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = CCST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_type CCT ON CCST.checkup_contract_type_id = CCT.checkup_contract_type_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CHT ON CCT.company_checkup_type_id = CHT.company_checkup_type_id LEFT JOIN center HC ON CCT.center_id = HC.center_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON HC.hospital_id = H.hospital_id JOIN hospital_center_view HCV ON CCT.center_id = HCV.center_id WHERE E.deleted_at IS NULL AND EC.deleted_at IS NULL AND R.deleted_at IS NULL AND R.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT reservation_item.reservation_id , reservation_item.reservation_item_id , reservation_item.checkup_contract_item_id , reservation_item.register , reservation_item.copay , reservation_item.discount_bill , item.item_id , item.item_code , item.item_name , item.item_desc FROM reservation_item JOIN checkup_contract_item ON reservation_item.checkup_contract_item_id = checkup_contract_item.checkup_contract_item_id JOIN item ON checkup_contract_item.item_id = item.item_id WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} ORDER BY register

SELECT CHT.company_checkup_type_id , CCST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , CCST.sub_type_name , H.hospital_id , H.hospital_name , HC.center_id , HC.center_name , R.reservation_id , R.reservation_state , R.desired_at , DATE_FORMAT(R.desired_at, '%p') AS ampm , R.confirmed_at , C.company_id , C.company_name , E.employee_name , E.user_id , E.employee_code , E.birth , E.sex , E.mobile , CASE WHEN E.myself IS NULL THEN (SELECT employee_name FROM employee WHERE employee_code = E.employee_code AND myself = 1) END AS family_name , E.myself , CHT.company_checkup_type_code , CHT.company_checkup_type_name , EC.support_type , EC.vip , R.registered_at , R.canceled_at , R.canceled_user_id FROM reservation R LEFT JOIN employee_checkup EC ON R.employee_checkup_id = EC.employee_checkup_id LEFT JOIN employee E ON EC.user_id = E.user_id LEFT JOIN company C ON E.company_id = C.company_id JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type CCST ON R.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = CCST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_type CCT ON CCST.checkup_contract_type_id = CCT.checkup_contract_type_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CHT ON CCT.company_checkup_type_id = CHT.company_checkup_type_id LEFT JOIN center HC ON CCT.center_id = HC.center_id LEFT JOIN hospital H ON HC.hospital_id = H.hospital_id WHERE E.deleted_at IS NULL AND EC.deleted_at IS NULL AND R.deleted_at IS NULL AND R.reservation_state = 0 AND C.company_id = #{companyId}
AND H.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE reservation SET hospital_notes = #{hospitalNotes} , platform_notes = #{platformNotes} , state_notes = #{stateNotes} , checkuped_at = DATE_ADD(DATE(#{checkupedAt}), INTERVAL IF(#{checkupedAmpm} = 'AM', 10, 14) HOUR)
, reservation_state = #{reservationState}
, checkuped_at = NULL , canceled_at = NOW() , confirmed_at = NOW() , canceled_user_id = #{sessionUserId}
, confirmed_at = NULL , checkuped_at = NULL
, confirmed_at = NOW()
, confirmed_at = DATE_ADD(DATE(#{confirmedAt}), INTERVAL IF(#{confirmedAmpm} = 'AM', 10, 14) HOUR)
, checkuped_at = NULL
, confirmed_at = NULL , checkuped_at = NULL
, checkuped_at = DATE_ADD(DATE(#{checkupedAt}), INTERVAL IF(#{checkupedAmpm} = 'AM', 10, 14) HOUR)
, checkuped_at = NOW()
, confirmed_at = NULL , checkuped_at = NULL
, updated_user_id = #{userId} , updated_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE reservation SET confirmed_at = NOW() , updated_user_id = canceled_user_id , updated_at = NOW() WHERE confirmed_at IS NULL AND canceled_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO reservation_history (reservation_id , employee_checkup_id , checkup_contract_sub_type_id , reservation_state , reservation_name , birth , sex , email , mobile , zipcode , address1 , address2 , employee_notes , hospital_notes , platform_notes , upgrade_pay , support_pay , copay , hospital_pay , platform_pay , sum_item_copay , sum_item_discount_bill , registered_at , desired_at , confirmed_at , checkuped_at , resulted_at , canceled_at , canceled_user_id , history_user_id , created_at , created_user_id , updated_at , updated_user_id , deleted_at , deleted_user_id) SELECT reservation_id , employee_checkup_id , checkup_contract_sub_type_id , reservation_state , reservation_name , birth , sex , email , mobile , zipcode , address1 , address2 , employee_notes , hospital_notes , platform_notes , upgrade_pay , support_pay , copay , hospital_pay , platform_pay , sum_item_copay , sum_item_discount_bill , registered_at , desired_at , confirmed_at , checkuped_at , resulted_at , canceled_at , canceled_user_id , #{sessionUserId} AS history_user_id , created_at , created_user_id , updated_at , updated_user_id , deleted_at , deleted_user_id FROM reservation WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO reservation_item_history ( reservation_history_id , reservation_item_id , reservation_id , checkup_contract_item_id , register , copay , discount_bill , created_user_id) SELECT #{reservationHistoryId} , reservation_item_id , reservation_id , checkup_contract_item_id , register , copay , discount_bill , created_user_id FROM reservation_item WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT day_off_id , day_off , am_pm , item_ids , notes , (CASE am_pm WHEN 'AM' THEN '?ㅼ쟾 遺덇?' WHEN 'PM' THEN '?ㅽ썑 遺덇?' ELSE notes END) AS impossible FROM day_off WHERE center_id = #{centerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY am_pm
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO day_off ( center_id , day_off , am_pm , item_ids , notes , created_user_id , updated_user_id) SELECT #{targetCenterId}, day_off, am_pm, item_ids, notes, #{sessionUserId}, #{sessionUserId} FROM day_off do WHERE center_id = #{centerId} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE day_off = do.day_off, am_pm = do.am_pm
mapper.select:
# ReserveMapper.selectNonReserveList SELECT E.user_id , E.employee_name , E.birth , E.sex , E.depart , E.title , E.myself , CASE WHEN E.myself IS NULL THEN (SELECT employee_name FROM employee WHERE employee_code = E.employee_code AND employee.company_id = E.company_id AND myself = 1) END AS family_name , E.employee_no , E.mobile , E.email , EC.notes , EC.vip , EC.notok_urge , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , R.reservation_id , R.reservation_state FROM employee_checkup EC JOIN employee E ON EC.user_id = E.user_id AND E.deleted_at IS NULL AND E.no_use = 0 LEFT JOIN reservation R ON EC.employee_checkup_id = R.employee_checkup_id AND (R.reservation_state != 0 OR R.confirmed_at IS NULL) LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON EC.company_checkup_type_id = CCT.company_checkup_type_id WHERE EC.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (R.reservation_state IS NULL OR R.reservation_state = 0) AND EC.support_type = 0 AND EC.company_checkup_id = #{companyCheckupId}

SELECT E.user_id , E.employee_name , E.birth , E.sex , E.depart , E.title , E.myself , CASE WHEN E.myself IS NULL THEN (SELECT employee_name FROM employee WHERE employee_code = E.employee_code AND employee.company_id = E.company_id AND myself = 1) END AS family_name , E.employee_no , E.mobile , E.email , E.company_id , C.company_name , EC.notes , EC.vip , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , R.reservation_id , R.reservation_state FROM employee_checkup EC JOIN employee E ON EC.user_id = E.user_id AND E.deleted_at IS NULL AND E.no_use = 0 LEFT JOIN company C ON E.company_id = C.company_id LEFT JOIN reservation R ON EC.employee_checkup_id = R.employee_checkup_id AND (R.reservation_state != 0 OR R.confirmed_at IS NULL) LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON EC.company_checkup_type_id = CCT.company_checkup_type_id JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON C.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year WHERE EC.deleted_at IS NULL AND (R.reservation_state IS NULL OR R.reservation_state = 0) AND NOT (E.myself IS NULL AND EC.support_type = 1) AND EC.company_checkup_id = (SELECT company_checkup_id FROM company_checkup CC JOIN company_manager CM ON CM.company_id = CC.company_id WHERE CM.user_id = #{userId} AND CC.checkup_year = LAST_CC.checkup_year) ORDER BY E.user_id
SELECT hospital_id , hospital_code , hospital_name , center_id , center_code , center_name , hospital_center_name FROM hospital_center_view WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId}

SELECT CMC.company_id , C.company_name , CMC.contract , CMC.reserve , CMC.result , HC.hospital_id , HC.center_name , CC.checkup_year , CMC.user_id , HM.center_manager_name , HM.no_use FROM center_manager_company CMC INNER JOIN company C ON C.company_id = CMC.company_id INNER JOIN center_manager HM ON HM.user_id = CMC.user_id INNER JOIN center HC ON HC.center_id = HM.center_id INNER JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id AND CC.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE CMC.deleted_at is NULL AND C.deleted_at is NULL AND HM.deleted_at is NULL AND HC.deleted_at is NULL AND HM.no_use = 0 AND CMC.contract = 1 AND C.company_id = #{companyId} AND HC.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
